srgb.label: Wassily sRGB
notes: Peak chroma shifts from Tailwind 600 to Wassily sRGB 500.

p3.label: Wassily P3 target
notes: P3 target preserves the Tailwind 500 source seed exactly.
Peak chroma shifts from Tailwind 600 to Wassily P3 target 500.

dualFallback.label: Dual sRGB fallback
notes: Dual fallback is sRGB mapped from the P3 target ramp, not separately solved.
Peak chroma shifts from Tailwind 600 to Dual sRGB fallback 500.

srgb.label: Wassily sRGB
notes: Tailwind 500 is outside sRGB; Wassily currently compresses to sRGB.
Contract: source seed maps to sRGB target (source d=0.020, target d=0.000).
Wassily's reported seed anchor is 400, not 500.
Peak chroma shifts from Tailwind 600 to Wassily sRGB 400.
Hue drift behavior is materially different.
Inspect highlight identity: Tailwind trends sunny/yellow; Wassily may trend peach/tan.
